name: UNITED BANCORP INC /OH/
summary: United Bancorp, Inc. is an Ohio bank holding company headquartered in Martins Ferry, Ohio, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary Unified Bank. The company provides commercial and retail banking services including demand, savings, and time deposits, as well as commercial, real estate, and consumer loans. It operates through a main office, standalone operations center, and eighteen branches across northeastern, eastern, southeastern, and south central Ohio and the Northern panhandle of West Virginia.

products.name: Demand Deposits
products.description: Standard checking and demand deposit accounts for retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Savings and Time Deposits
products.description: Savings accounts and certificates of deposit for retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Business lending products for commercial customers across Ohio and West Virginia markets.

products.name: Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage and real estate lending products for retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Personal lending products for individual retail banking customers.
